summary: Frontend testing completed for Raw Material Cost calculation improvements in Product Setup. All 8 features tested and verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: calculateIngredientCost function (Settings.js lines 517-558) correctly handles unit conversions for غرام/كغم/مل/لتر/قطعة/حبة
Code review passed: Raw material cost field in Add Product form (lines 3500-3524) is readOnly with dynamic red/purple styling
Code review passed: Raw material cost field in Edit Product form (lines 4090-4114) is readOnly with dynamic red/purple styling
Code review passed: Cost recalculates automatically when quantity changes (lines 3690-3700)
Code review passed: Cost recalculates automatically when unit changes (lines 3704-3719)
Code review passed: WarehouseManufacturing tabs (lines 975-1059) use flex-wrap to display all 9 tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Raw Material Cost calculation improvements verified: 1) Cost field is read-only in both Add and Edit product forms. 2) Red styling (bg-red-50, text-red-600) when no manufactured product linked or cost=0. 3) Purple styling (bg-purple-50, text-purple-600) when manufactured product is linked. 4) Cost recalculates when quantity changes (tested: 100g->200g beef changed cost from 1410 to 2210). 5) Cost recalculates when unit changes (tested: غرام->كغم changed cost from 1410 to 800610). 6) WarehouseManufacturing page shows all 9 tabs with flex-wrap enabled.

tests_performed.feature: Add Product - Raw material cost field read-only
tests_performed.details: Cost field has readOnly=true attribute, cursor-not-allowed class

tests_performed.feature: Add Product - Red styling when no link (cost=0)
tests_performed.details: backgroundColor: rgb(254, 242, 242), color: rgb(220, 38, 38), borderColor: rgb(252, 165, 165)

tests_performed.feature: Add Product - Purple styling when linked
tests_performed.details: After selecting manufactured product: backgroundColor: rgb(250, 245, 255), color: rgb(147, 51, 234)

tests_performed.feature: Add Product - Cost recalculates on quantity change
tests_performed.details: Changed beef from 100g to 200g: cost changed from 1410 to 2210 IQD

tests_performed.feature: Add Product - Cost recalculates on unit change
tests_performed.details: Changed beef unit from غرام to كغم: cost changed from 1410 to 800610 IQD (100kg × 8000 IQD/kg)

tests_performed.feature: Edit Product - Raw material cost field read-only
tests_performed.details: Cost field has readOnly=true, value=3000, red styling (no manufactured product linked)

tests_performed.feature: Edit Product - Red styling when no link
WarehouseManufacturing - All tabs visible with flex-wrap
tests_performed.details: Found 9 tabs with flexWrap: wrap, display: flex. Tabs: المخزن, طلبات التصنيع, الورقيات, طلب تغليف, مخزون الفرع, التصنيع, طلبات الفروع, الحركات, التحويلات
